title: Functions
summary: Package logic into functions so it is easier to reuse and test.
content_html:
A function can receive input, process it, and return a result.

def add(a, b):
    return a + b

exercises.title: Function declaration keyword
exercises.prompt: Which keyword declares a function in Python?

exercises.title: Return a result
exercises.prompt: Which keyword returns a result from a function?

exercises.title: Write an add function
exercises.prompt: Write a function add(a, b) that returns the sum of two numbers.
